name: Flexi Star Fidget
info: This unique 3D-printed spiral star fidget features a mesmerizing layered design that smoothly rotates around a central axle, creating a satisfying and calming motion. Made from durable, high-quality material with an eye-catching metallic red finish, it’s perfect for relieving stress, improving focus, or simply enjoying as a stylish desk toy. Compact and lightweight, it’s great for home, school, or the office, and also makes a thoughtful gift for fidget toy fans, tech lovers, or anyone who enjoys visually satisfying gadgets.
